description_long: This is a modern, light wood-finished desk featuring a spacious, curved main work surface and a raised secondary shelf supported by three cylindrical posts. The left side of the desk has an open cubby suitable for storing a computer tower or books, while the right side features a cabinet with a door, likely for additional storage. The desk's design is functional and ergonomic, with a wave-shaped front edge for comfortable seating and easy access to the workspace. The raised shelf provides extra space for monitors or accessories, and the overall construction appears sturdy with clean, straight lines. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving the desk a contemporary yet natural appearance. The desk is free of visible wear or damage, suggesting it is either new or very well maintained.
description: A modern, light wood desk with a curved front edge, raised shelf, open cubby, and a storage cabinet. The design is clean, ergonomic, and well-suited for organized workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved main surface, raised shelf, open cubby on the left, and cabinet with door on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth, the wave-shaped front edge, and the raised shelf's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels, the underside of the raised shelf, and the open structure of the cubby and cabinet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the desk's length, the smooth side panel, and the layered surfaces.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the curved edge, open cubby on the left, and cabinet on the right, with the raised shelf at the back for monitors or accessories.
